We help business owners identify exactly what their business needs to grow — and then build it. We work across AI systems, automation, website development, AI chatbots, and content strategy. The agency was built on one observation: most businesses get sold tools and services before anyone has actually looked at their business. Agencies sell what they build. NeuraFlux's long-term reputation is built on integrity, speed of delivery, and measurable results. Every competitor starts by pitching what they build. NeuraFlux starts by asking what the client's business actually needs — and is prepared to refer out if the answer points elsewhere. SECTION 3 — SERVICE 02 Website Development Common Questions — Website Development Do I need to write my own copy for the website? No. NeuraFlux produces all website copy as part of the engagement — written in your voice, structured for conversion. You review and approve. You do not write from scratch. What platform do you build on? Next.js deployed on Vercel. This is a modern, fast, developer-maintained stack — not a drag-and-drop builder. It means the site is fully custom, fully owned by you, and easily expandable as the business grows. Can I update the website myself after it is built? Yes. A content management system can be connected for copy changes. Structural changes would require a developer. Sarmad will advise on the right setup for your situation during the audit. What is your minimum website standard? Loads under 2 seconds on mobile. Tested on iPhone SE, iPad, and desktop. Zero console errors. Lighthouse score above 85. These are non-negotiable build standards — not aspirational targets. Do you do e-commerce? E-commerce and payment processing are not a primary service at NeuraFlux. If your business needs this, it will be flagged during the audit and you will be referred to the appropriate resource. SECTION 4 — SERVICE 03 AI Chatbots Common Questions — AI Chatbots Does the chatbot use ChatGPT or OpenAI? NeuraFlux builds custom AI chatbots in-house. The system uses a Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) architecture built on your own data — it does not rely on or resell third-party AI API subscriptions. This means the bot is trained on your business, not on generic internet data. What does RAG mean? RAG stands for Retrieval-Augmented Generation. It means the chatbot retrieves relevant information from your own business documents before generating an answer — so responses are grounded in your actual content, not hallucinated from general knowledge. This is why the knowledge base documents (like this one) matter so much. Can the chatbot book appointments directly? Yes. The visitor is not asking for information — they are expressing a reason they cannot or will not move forward. Treating an objection like a FAQ and answering it with information alone almost always fails. The correct sequence for every objection is A.E.R.R. — four steps in order. Never skip a step. Never go straight to the redirect without first acknowledging and empathising.
